expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((in0.NDOD_3 = in1.LEG_NDOD) AND (in0.TT_NDOD = in1.TT_NDOD)) THEN in1.PAX ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.NDOD_5 = in1.LEG_NDOD) AND (in0.TT_NDOD = in1.TT_NDOD)) THEN in1.PAX ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING)  IN ('CA' , 'NV' , 'AZ' , 'UT')) THEN 'CA' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING)  IN ('WA' , 'OR' , 'ID')) THEN 'PNW' ELSE DEST_STATE END)

(
  CASE
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_4 AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('WA', 'OR', 'ID'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING) IN ('WA', 'OR', 'ID'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS STRING) IN ('WA', 'OR', 'ID'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_4 AS STRING) IN ('WA', 'OR', 'ID'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('AK'))
      THEN 'AK'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING) IN ('AK'))
      THEN 'AK'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS STRING) IN ('AK'))
      THEN 'AK'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_4 AS STRING) IN ('AK'))
      THEN 'AK'
    ELSE 'HI'
  END
)

condition.expression: (((((NOT (ORIG = DEST_2)) OR (ORIG IS NULL)) OR (DEST_2 IS NULL)) AND (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING)  IN ('WA' , 'OR' , 'ID' , 'AK' , 'CA' , 'NV' , 'AZ' , 'UT' , 'HI'))) AND (((((DEST_STATE = 'AK') OR (NOT (ORIG_STATE = 'AK'))) OR (ORIG_STATE IS NULL)) OR (NOT (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))) OR (DEST_STATE IS NULL)))

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (ORIG < DEST) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, DEST)) ELSE (CONCAT(DEST, ORIG)) END)

(CASE WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 1) THEN 'TRUNK   ' WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 2) THEN 'ADD-ON 1' WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 3) THEN 'ADD-ON 2' WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 4) THEN 'ADD-ON 3' WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 5) THEN 'ADD-ON 4' ELSE NULL END)

CAST((
  CASE
    WHEN ((MIN_REGION_RANK = -1) AND ((ORIG = 'PPG') OR (DEST = 'PPG')))
      THEN 378
    WHEN (MIN_REGION_RANK = -1)
      THEN 3
    WHEN ((NOT(CAST(ORIG_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('US', 'CA'))) OR (ORIG_COUNTRY IS NULL))
      THEN 5
    WHEN ((NOT(CAST(DEST_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('US', 'CA'))) OR (DEST_COUNTRY IS NULL))
      THEN 5
    WHEN (
      (
        NOT(
          ORIG_COUNTRY = 'US')
      ) OR (ORIG_COUNTRY IS NULL)
    )
      THEN 40
    WHEN (
      (
        NOT(
          DEST_COUNTRY = 'US')
      ) OR (DEST_COUNTRY IS NULL)
    )
      THEN 40
    WHEN (CAST(ORIG_STATE AS STRING) IN ('AK', 'HI'))
      THEN 30
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('AK', 'HI'))
      THEN 30
    ELSE 0
  END
) AS INTEGER)

(CASE WHEN (STOPS = 1) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, '-', CNX, '-', DEST)) WHEN (STOPS = 2) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, '-', CNX, '-', CNX_2, '-', DEST)) WHEN (STOPS = 3) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, '-', CNX, '-', CNX_2, '-', CNX_3, '-', DEST)) WHEN (STOPS = 4) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, '-', CNX, '-', CNX_2, '-', CNX_3, '-', CNX_4, '-', DEST)) ELSE NULL END)

(
  CASE
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('WA', 'OR', 'ID'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING) IN ('WA', 'OR', 'ID'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS STRING) IN ('WA', 'OR', 'ID'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('AK'))
      THEN 'AK'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING) IN ('AK'))
      THEN 'AK'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS STRING) IN ('AK'))
      THEN 'AK'
    ELSE 'HI'
  END
)
(CASE WHEN ((LENGTH(ADD_ON_2)) < 6) THEN NULL ELSE ADD_ON_2 END)
(CASE WHEN ((LENGTH(ADD_ON_3)) < 6) THEN NULL ELSE ADD_ON_3 END)

condition.expression: (((((NOT (ORIG = DEST_3)) OR (ORIG IS NULL)) OR (DEST_3 IS NULL)) AND (((NOT (DEST = DEST_3)) OR (DEST IS NULL)) OR (DEST_3 IS NULL))) AND (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING)  IN ('WA' , 'OR' , 'ID' , 'AK' , 'CA' , 'NV' , 'AZ' , 'UT' , 'HI')))

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((in0.NDOD_4 = in1.LEG_NDOD) AND (in0.TT_NDOD = in1.TT_NDOD)) THEN in1.PAX ELSE NULL END)

(
  CASE
    WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 378)
      THEN 111
    WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'JP') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'JP')))
      THEN 500
    WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'KR') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'KR')))
      THEN 1000
    WHEN (
      (
        (
          ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'AU') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'AU')))
          OR ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'NZ') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'NZ')))
        )
        OR ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'CK') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'CK')))
      )
      OR ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'PF') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'PF')))
    )
      THEN 510
    WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 3)
      THEN NULL
    WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 5)
      THEN 96
    WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 40)
      THEN 86
    WHEN ((((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND (ORIG_STATE = 'AK')) AND (DEST_STATE = 'AK')) AND (ROUTING = 'AK'))
      THEN 6
    WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND (ORIG_STATE = 'AK')) AND (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))
      THEN NULL
    WHEN (
      (
        ((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'AK') OR (DEST_STATE = 'AK')))
        AND ((ORIG = 'PAE') OR (DEST = 'PAE'))
      )
      AND (ROUTING = 'AK')
    )
      THEN 16
    WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'AK') OR (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))) AND (ROUTING = 'AK'))
      THEN 114
    WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'HI') OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI'))) AND (ROUTING = 'CA'))
      THEN 33
    WHEN (
      (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'HI') OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI'))) AND (ROUTING = 'PNW'))
      OR (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'HI') OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI'))) AND (ROUTING = 'HI'))
    )
      THEN 14
    WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'AK') OR (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))) AND (ROUTING = 'PNW'))
      THEN 16
    WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 0) AND (ROUTING = 'PNW'))
      THEN 56
    WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 0) AND (ROUTING = 'CA'))
      THEN 66
    ELSE NULL
  END
)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((PAX_1 IS NULL) AND (NDOD_1 IS NOT NULL)) THEN '0' ELSE PAX_1 END) AS DOUBLE)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((PAX_2 IS NULL) AND (NDOD_2 IS NOT NULL)) THEN '0' ELSE PAX_2 END) AS DOUBLE)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((PAX_3 IS NULL) AND (NDOD_3 IS NOT NULL)) THEN '0' ELSE PAX_3 END) AS DOUBLE)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((PAX_4 IS NULL) AND (NDOD_4 IS NOT NULL)) THEN '0' ELSE PAX_4 END) AS DOUBLE)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((PAX_5 IS NULL) AND (NDOD_5 IS NOT NULL)) THEN '0' ELSE PAX_5 END) AS DOUBLE)

condition.expression: ((NOT (CAST(TT_TARIFF AS DOUBLE)  IN (3 , 378))) OR (((CAST(TT_TARIFF AS DOUBLE) = 3) OR (CAST(TT_TARIFF AS DOUBLE) = 378)) IS NULL))

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((in0.NDOD_2 = in1.LEG_NDOD) AND (in0.TT_NDOD = in1.TT_NDOD)) THEN in1.PAX ELSE NULL END)

(CASE WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING)  IN ('CA' , 'NV' , 'AZ' , 'UT')) THEN 'CA' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING)  IN ('CA' , 'NV' , 'AZ' , 'UT')) THEN 'CA' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING)  IN ('WA' , 'OR' , 'ID')) THEN 'PNW' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING)  IN ('WA' , 'OR' , 'ID')) THEN 'PNW' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING)  IN ('AK')) THEN 'AK' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS STRING)  IN ('AK')) THEN 'AK' ELSE 'HI' END)

(CASE WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 0) THEN 'Y' WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 5) AND (CAST(TRUNK_REGION AS STRING)  IN ('MX' , 'LA'))) THEN 'Y' WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND (CAST(TRUNK_REGION AS STRING)  IN ('HC' , 'HP' , 'AL' , 'AR'))) THEN 'Y' WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 40) AND (TRUNK_REGION = 'CD')) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END)
(FIRST_VALUE(SHORTENED_REGION) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST))

condition.expression: ((((((NOT (ORIG = DEST_4)) OR (ORIG IS NULL)) OR (DEST_4 IS NULL)) AND (((NOT (DEST = DEST_4)) OR (DEST IS NULL)) OR (DEST_4 IS NULL))) AND (((NOT (DEST_2 = DEST_4)) OR (DEST_2 IS NULL)) OR (DEST_4 IS NULL))) AND (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS STRING)  IN ('WA' , 'OR' , 'ID' , 'AK' , 'CA' , 'NV' , 'AZ' , 'UT' , 'HI')))

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (ORIG < DEST) THEN TT_OD ELSE CAST((CONCAT(DEST, ORIG)) AS string) END)

(CASE WHEN (STOPS = 1) THEN (CONCAT(MILES, MILES_2)) WHEN (STOPS = 2) THEN (CONCAT(MILES, MILES_2, MILES_3)) WHEN (STOPS = 3) THEN (CONCAT(MILES, MILES_2, MILES_3, MILES_4)) WHEN (STOPS = 4) THEN (CONCAT(MILES, MILES_2, MILES_3, MILES_4, MILES_5)) ELSE NULL END)

condition.expression: ((PAX >= 1) AND (((NOT (LEG_NDOD = TT_NDOD)) OR (LEG_NDOD IS NULL)) OR (TT_NDOD IS NULL)))

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((TT_ROUTING = 114) AND (NOT (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(TT_PATH), '')), LOWER('-ANC-'))))) THEN 14 WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(TT_PATH), '')), LOWER('NRT-SEA'))) THEN 555 WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(TT_PATH), '')), LOWER('SEA-NRT'))) THEN 555 ELSE TT_ROUTING END)
(CASE WHEN (TT_PAX IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE TT_PAX END)

condition.expression:
(
  (
    (
      (
        (
          (
            (
              (
                (
                  (
                    (
                      (
                        (
                          (
                            (
                              (
                                (
                                  NOT (
                                    (
                                      ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND CAST(ORIG_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('JP', 'KR', 'AU', 'NZ', 'CK', 'PF'))
                                      AND CAST(DEST_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('JP', 'KR', 'AU', 'NZ', 'CK', 'PF')
                                    )
                                  )
                                  OR (
                                       (
                                         ((TT_TARIFF = 3 IS NULL) AND CAST(ORIG_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('JP', 'KR', 'AU', 'NZ', 'CK', 'PF'))
                                         AND CAST(DEST_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('JP', 'KR', 'AU', 'NZ', 'CK', 'PF')
                                       ))
                                )
                                AND (
                                      NOT (
                                        (
                                          (TT_ROUTING = 114)
                                          AND (
                                                CAST(substring(TT_NDOD, 1, 3) AS STRING) IN ('SEA', 'PDX')
                                                OR CAST(substring(TT_NDOD, ((length(TT_NDOD) - 3) + 1), 3) AS STRING) IN ('SEA', 'PDX')
                                              )
                                        )
                                      )
                                      OR (
                                           (
                                             (TT_ROUTING = 114 IS NULL)
                                             AND (
                                                   CAST(substring(TT_NDOD, 1, 3) AS STRING) IN ('SEA', 'PDX')
                                                   OR CAST(substring(TT_NDOD, ((length(TT_NDOD) - 3) + 1), 3) AS STRING) IN ('SEA', 'PDX')
                                                 )
                                           ))
                                    )
                              )
                              AND (
                                    NOT (
                                      (
                                        (
                                          (
                                            (
                                              (
                                                ((TT_ROUTING = 33) AND (STOPS > 1))
                                                AND (
                                                      (
                                                        NOT(
                                                          ORIG = 'ITO')
                                                      ) OR (ORIG IS NULL)
                                                    )
                                              )
                                              AND (
                                                    (
                                                      NOT(
                                                        DEST = 'ITO')
                                                    ) OR (DEST IS NULL)
                                                  )
                                            )
                                            OR (TT_ROUTING = 33)
                                          )
                                          AND (STOPS > 2)
                                        )
                                        AND ((ORIG = 'ITO') OR (DEST = 'ITO'))
                                      )
                                    )
                                    OR (
                                         (
                                           (
                                             (
                                               (
                                                 (
                                                   ((TT_ROUTING = 33 IS NULL) AND (STOPS > 1))
                                                   AND (
                                                         (
                                                           NOT(
                                                             ORIG = 'ITO')
                                                         ) OR (ORIG IS NULL)
                                                       )
                                                 )
                                                 AND (
                                                       (
                                                         NOT(
                                                           DEST = 'ITO')
                                                       ) OR (DEST IS NULL)
                                                     )
                                               )
                                               OR (TT_ROUTING = 33)
                                             )
                                             AND (STOPS > 2)
                                           )
                                           AND ((ORIG = 'ITO') OR (DEST = 'ITO'))
                                         ))
                                  )
                            )
                            AND (
                                  CAST(ORIG_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX', 'BZ', 'CR', 'GT', 'BS')
                                  OR CAST(DEST_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX', 'BZ', 'CR', 'GT', 'BS')
                                )
                          )
                          AND (
                                NOT (CAST(concat(ORIG_COUNTRY, DEST_COUNTRY) AS STRING) IN ('CACA'))
                                OR (concat(ORIG_COUNTRY, DEST_COUNTRY IS NULL))
                              )
                        )
                        AND (
                              (
                                (NOT (CAST(ORIG_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('MX', 'BZ', 'CR', 'GT', 'BS')) OR (ORIG_COUNTRY IS NULL))
                                OR NOT (CAST(DEST_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('MX', 'BZ', 'CR', 'GT', 'BS'))
                              )
                              OR (DEST_COUNTRY IS NULL)
                            )
                      )
                      AND (
                            NOT (
                              (
                                ((ORIG_STATE = 'AK') AND (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))
                                AND ((((CNX = 'SEA') OR (CNX_2 = 'SEA')) OR (CNX_3 = 'SEA')) OR (CNX_4 = 'SEA'))
                              )
                            )
                            OR (
                                 (
                                   ((ORIG_STATE = 'AK' IS NULL) AND (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))
                                   AND ((((CNX = 'SEA') OR (CNX_2 = 'SEA')) OR (CNX_3 = 'SEA')) OR (CNX_4 = 'SEA'))
                                 ))
                          )
                    )
                    AND (
                          NOT (
                            (
                              (
                                (
                                  (ORIG_STATE = 'HI')
                                  AND (
                                        NOT (CAST(DEST_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('US', 'CA', 'JP', 'KR', 'AU', 'NZ', 'CK', 'PF'))
                                        OR (DEST_COUNTRY IS NULL)
                                      )
                                )
                                OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI')
                              )
                              AND (
                                    NOT (CAST(ORIG_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('US', 'CA', 'JP', 'KR', 'AU', 'NZ', 'CK', 'PF'))
                                    OR (ORIG_COUNTRY IS NULL)
                                  )
                            )
                          )
                          OR (
                               (
                                 (
                                   (
                                     (ORIG_STATE = 'HI' IS NULL)
                                     AND (
                                           NOT (CAST(DEST_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('US', 'CA', 'JP', 'KR', 'AU', 'NZ', 'CK', 'PF'))
                                           OR (DEST_COUNTRY IS NULL)
                                         )
                                   )
                                   OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI')
                                 )
                                 AND (
                                       NOT (CAST(ORIG_COUNTRY AS STRING) IN ('US', 'CA', 'JP', 'KR', 'AU', 'NZ', 'CK', 'PF'))
                                       OR (ORIG_COUNTRY IS NULL)
                                     )
                               ))
                        )
                  )
                  AND NOT ((TT_ROUTING IS NULL))
                )
                AND (
                      NOT (((((TT_ROUTING = 56) AND (STOPS > 1)) OR (TT_ROUTING = 66)) AND (STOPS > 1)))
                      OR (((((TT_ROUTING = 56 IS NULL) AND (STOPS > 1)) OR (TT_ROUTING = 66)) AND (STOPS > 1)))
                    )
              )
              AND (
                    NOT (((ORIG_STATE = 'MT') AND (DEST_STATE = 'MT')))
                    OR (((ORIG_STATE = 'MT' IS NULL) AND (DEST_STATE = 'MT')))
                  )
            )
            AND (
                  NOT (
                    (
                      contains(coalesce(lower(TT_PATH), ''), lower('SEA'))
                      AND contains(coalesce(lower(TT_PATH), ''), lower('PAE'))
                    )
                  )
                  OR (
                       (
                         contains(coalesce(lower(TT_PATH IS NULL), ''), lower('SEA'))
                         AND contains(coalesce(lower(TT_PATH), ''), lower('PAE'))
                       ))
                )
          )
          AND (
                NOT (
                  (
                    (
                      (
                        (
                          (
                            (
                              CAST(ORIG_STATE AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'NM')
                              AND CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'NM')
                            )
                            AND (
                                  (
                                    NOT(
                                      ORIG = 'RNO')
                                  ) OR (ORIG IS NULL)
                                )
                          )
                          AND (
                                (
                                  NOT(
                                    DEST = 'RNO')
                                ) OR (DEST IS NULL)
                              )
                        )
                        AND (
                              (
                                NOT(
                                  ORIG = 'RDD')
                              ) OR (ORIG IS NULL)
                            )
                      )
                      AND (
                            (
                              NOT(
                                DEST = 'RDD')
                            ) OR (DEST IS NULL)
                          )
                    )
                    AND (TT_ROUTING = 56)
                  )
                )
                OR (
                     (
                       (
                         (
                           (
                             (
                               (
                                 CAST(ORIG_STATE AS STRING IS NULL) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'NM')
                                 AND CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('CA', 'NV', 'AZ', 'NM')
                               )
                               AND (
                                     (
                                       NOT(
                                         ORIG = 'RNO')
                                     ) OR (ORIG IS NULL)
                                   )
                             )
                             AND (
                                   (
                                     NOT(
                                       DEST = 'RNO')
                                   ) OR (DEST IS NULL)
                                 )
                           )
                           AND (
                                 (
                                   NOT(
                                     ORIG = 'RDD')
                                 ) OR (ORIG IS NULL)
                               )
                         )
                         AND (
                               (
                                 NOT(
                                   DEST = 'RDD')
                               ) OR (DEST IS NULL)
                             )
                       )
                       AND (TT_ROUTING = 56)
                     ))
              )
        )
        AND (
              NOT ((((ORIG_STATE = 'ID') AND (DEST_STATE = 'ID')) AND (TT_ROUTING = 66)))
              OR ((((ORIG_STATE = 'ID' IS NULL) AND (DEST_STATE = 'ID')) AND (TT_ROUTING = 66)))
            )
      )
      AND (
            NOT (
              (
                (CAST(ORIG_STATE AS STRING) IN ('OR', 'WA') AND CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('OR', 'WA'))
                AND (TT_ROUTING = 66)
              )
            )
            OR (
                 (
                   (CAST(ORIG_STATE AS STRING IS NULL) IN ('OR', 'WA') AND CAST(DEST_STATE AS STRING) IN ('OR', 'WA'))
                   AND (TT_ROUTING = 66)
                 ))
          )
    )
    AND (
          NOT (
            (
              CAST(ORIG AS STRING) IN ('SMF', 'STS', 'OAK', 'SJC', 'SFO')
              AND CAST(DEST AS STRING) IN ('SMF', 'STS', 'OAK', 'SJC', 'SFO')
            )
          )
          OR (
               (
                 CAST(ORIG AS STRING IS NULL) IN ('SMF', 'STS', 'OAK', 'SJC', 'SFO')
                 AND CAST(DEST AS STRING) IN ('SMF', 'STS', 'OAK', 'SJC', 'SFO')
               ))
        )
  )
  AND (
        NOT (
          (
            CAST(ORIG AS STRING) IN ('LAX', 'BUR', 'ONT', 'SNA', 'SAN')
            AND CAST(DEST AS STRING) IN ('LAX', 'BUR', 'ONT', 'SNA', 'SAN')
          )
        )
        OR (
             (

             ))
      )
)

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((in0.NDOD_1 = in1.LEG_NDOD) AND (in0.TT_NDOD = in1.TT_NDOD)) THEN in1.PAX ELSE NULL END)

CAST(((CASE WHEN ((((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001) < 0) AND ((((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001) - FLOOR(((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001))) = 0.5)) THEN CEIL(((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001)) ELSE CAST(ROUND(((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001)) AS DECIMAL(19, 0)) END) * 0.001) AS DOUBLE)

condition.expression: (((((((NOT (ORIG = DEST_5)) OR (ORIG IS NULL)) OR (DEST_5 IS NULL)) AND (((NOT (DEST = DEST_5)) OR (DEST IS NULL)) OR (DEST_5 IS NULL))) AND (((NOT (DEST_2 = DEST_5)) OR (DEST_2 IS NULL)) OR (DEST_5 IS NULL))) AND (((NOT (DEST_3 = DEST_5)) OR (DEST_3 IS NULL)) OR (DEST_5 IS NULL))) AND (CAST(DEST_STATE_4 AS STRING)  IN ('WA' , 'OR' , 'ID' , 'AK' , 'CA' , 'NV' , 'AZ' , 'UT' , 'HI')))
